reviews.review_description:
Finally a karaoke on VR! Living in a foreign country, I get to sing those I learned while in Taiwan! 好極了，謝謝！！
Jan 10 2026: the app is not working. :(
No lyrics, hardly any song choices in English
Love you can lounge in the lounge area and look outside, and play games. The only downside is a lot of the songs aren’t English but game has great potential

A lot of the songs are in Chinese. I really don't know if it's Chinese . I just know that it's not in English. In the description, it mentioned you can play baseball and you can play Arcade or something like that. You can't do any of that in here. That's a little false advertisement right there, but the app itself is really fun. The song area, it displays a lot of Chinese songs. Even though I have put in some American songs, it has very little american songs that you can choose from. It looks like there is a menu where you can buy something I'm not sure because I don't read Chinese I'm trying to change it where I can see what they're saying because I definitely want to buy package where you can play games together and stuff like that like they mentioned in the description. It's a little hard to navigate on that screen. But this game has potential for sure! I just hope that the developers did not give up on this app.

It’s a great setup and I like that you can choose your settings for solo or with others. However the song selection sucks if you only speak English. At least the could have the typical American songs. Makes you think they only want a certain group to use. It would also be nice if you could adjust the tempo and echo.

Hope this gets updated because I feel like it could be so much fun.
This app is hard to use. Not user friendly at all. It does not work properly.

If you are from region that is not listed ypu are not able to verify yourself, and if you use email authentication for me it also did not work. As of now the app seems like trash. (Because it only displays login which is not functional)

reviews.review_title: Good approach, but not working yet
reviews.review_description:
The app is not working properly at the moment. Although many settings can be made, the song/clip is not played. Changing the language to English is not easy with the preset Chinese, and even after that the vast majority of music titles are not translated into English. The pool of English-language tracks is very limited and does not include many well-known classics. Unfortunately, you don't seem to be able to enter your own titles, e.g. via a YouTube search. A shop symbol implies that you can probably buy titles later.
The rooms are nicely designed (but without visitors yet), and you can set how much reverb is generated. The normal meta avatars are used. 
A proper test is not possible at the moment because the music does not work. I think the programmers are currently working on it. I have installed KARAMETA free of charge and will see what happens in the near future.
